response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely seasoned staff-level generalist with 20+ years across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, strong TypeScript depth, and directly relevant recent work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling — a notable match to the role's Model Context Protocol and multi-agent themes. However, the role demands 8+ years shipping production-grade AI solutions, and his AI exposure appears recent (2018-present at re:cinq) and infrastructure/tooling-oriented rather than end-to-end GenAI delivery. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, LLM optimization, or Python, and customer-facing enterprise AI delivery is not demonstrated, making him a stretch for this specific staff FDE GenAI profile despite his engineering caliber.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience, directly matching the role's key technologies
20+ years of broad production engineering with staff-level roles, strong TypeScript/Node.js, and high-scale systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, multi-day courses, dojos) relevant to the mentorship and customer-facing responsibilities
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience, all core to the role
Falls well short of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions; AI work appears recent and tooling-focused
Python absent from skills and limited evidence of designing AI systems on major cloud platforms

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI depth (RAG, vector DBs, 8+ yrs AI solutions)
Staff-level engineering breadth and mentoring record
